Module 9 - Lesson 1
Why 	You 	MUST 	Track 	Your 	Advertising & Funnel:
• Direct Response Marketing Is All About Communication & Math!
• Without Tracking You Have No Way Of Making Informed
Decisions About Scaling Certain Advertising Channels And
Ceasing Others!
• Without Tracking You Have No Way Of Making Informed
Decisions About Optimization!
• You Need To Know What A Visitor Is Worth So You Know What
You Can Afford To Invest To Generate More Visitors!
• Return On Investment Is The Name Of The Game!!
• Every Ad And Channel Must Be Tracked Separately And
Individually

-- 1 of 1 --
